§6ME Wireless Access Point§f:
The §6ME Wireless Access Point §f(appliedenergistics2:wireless_access_point) is a §enetwork bridge §f that §bconnects §f the ME network to a §6Wireless Terminal §f or other §6wireless AE2 device §f. It enables §bwireless §f access to the network from anywhere within §6range§f.

§6Production Path (network/wireless_access_point.json)§f:
Pattern "a / b / c":
- §ba§f: §6Wireless Receiver §f(appliedenergistics2:material:41) — 1 (top)
- §bb§f: §6Calculation Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:23) — 1 (middle)
- §cc§f: §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix §f(appliedenergistics2:part:16) — 1 (bottom)
- Yields 1× ME Wireless Access Point

§6Function (BlockWirelessAccessPoint.java)§f:
- §bWireless network broadcast §f: emits a §6wireless signal §f to all §6wireless devices §f in range
- §bRange §f: §b16 §f blocks by default; extend with §6Range Cards §f (each +50% range, up to §b5 cards §f)
- §bRange tiers §f: 1 card = §b24 §f blocks, 2 cards = §b36 §f blocks, 3 cards = §b54 §f blocks, 4 cards = §b80 §f blocks, 5 cards = §b128 §f blocks
- §bPower draw §f: §b1 AE/t §f at idle; scales with the §6number of connected devices §f
- §bSecurity §f: a §6Security Terminal §f can lock the access point to specific §6player IDs §f
- §bChannel cost §f: §b1 channel §f from the host cable

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the ME Wireless Access Point is a component of, but it is referenced in 290 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bWireless Terminal §f access (see §6Wireless Terminal §f quest)
- §bWireless Crafting Terminal §f access
- §bWireless Pattern Terminal §f access
- §bWireless Fluid Terminal §f access

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: place the §6Wireless Access Point §f in a §bcentral §f location with §bclear line of sight §f for best range
- §eTip§f: combine a §6Wireless Access Point §f with a §6P2P Tunnel §f to extend the network wirelessly across long distances
- §cWarning§f: the §6Range §f resets on §6world reload §f; place a §6backup card §f in a §6ME Storage Cell §f
- §cWarning§f: a §bWireless Access Point §f in a §cdimension §f where the §bparent network §f is unloaded will §cnot §f work — the parent must be in a §6loaded chunk §f
